---
title: "Dedication"
---

| $\LARGE\mathcal{R}$especting others in dispute
| $\LARGE\mathcal{O}$pening ears and heart and mind
| $\LARGE\mathcal{B}$ecause through listening would take root
| $\LARGE\mathcal{E}$xtra wisdom he would find

| $\LARGE\mathcal{R}$espect that others gave in turn
| $\LARGE\mathcal{T}$o theories drawn from novel routes
| $\LARGE\mathcal{J}$udging that they too could learn
| $\LARGE\mathcal{M}$ore by listening than disputes

| $\LARGE\mathcal{I}$nfer from what they do and say
| $\LARGE\mathcal{S}$tudent's hidden states of mind
| $\LARGE\mathcal{L}$eading learners so they may
| $\LARGE\mathcal{E}$ach their best potential find

| $\LARGE\mathcal{V}$alidity from evidence
| $\LARGE\mathcal{Y}$ields assessment excellence

Copyright 2025 Russell G. Almond This poem may be reprinted under the terms of the CC Attributions 4.0 License <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en>
